prompt: Tag every open to-do in my 'Studio move' project with 'boxes'. Only the ones still open, and only in that project.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE p.title='Studio move' AND t.type=0 AND t.status=0 AND t.trashed=0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag g ON tt.tags=g.uuid WHERE tt.tasks=t.uuid AND g.title='boxes')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tt.tasks) AS n FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag g ON tt.tags=g.uuid WHERE g.title='boxes'

pseudoScript: for u in $(things show "Studio move" --json | jq -r '.data.view.active[]|select(.status=="open")|.uuid'); do things todo tags "$u" --add boxes; done
